name: Captn Trench
description: Capt’n Trench is a community powered meme project forged in the crypto trenches where creativity chaos and coordination collide. Built around the raw energy of early Web3 culture CPT brings together artists gamers raiders and meme enthusiasts under a single banner driven by shared identity rather than promises. The project embraces tactical fun humor and collective action as its foundation allowing the community to shape narratives visibility and momentum organically. There is no illusion of complexity or hidden mechanics CPT exists to represent participation belonging and culture. As a movement token it thrives on engagement raids banter and creative output turning community presence into its strongest asset.
